title: PR Context
description: PR business context for code-argus code review, providing issue tracker integration and additional context for review agents

prTitle.description: Pull request title (often contains issue key)

examples: This PR fixes the login validation issue reported in PROJ-123

issues.description: Array of issues associated with this PR (can be empty if no issue tracker integration)

jiraIssues.description: Deprecated: Use 'issues' instead. Kept for backward compatibility.

parseStatus.description: Status of issue key parsing: 'found' = issues found and fetched, 'none' = no issue keys in title, 'partial_error' = some issues failed to fetch

parseMessage.description: Optional status message for debugging (e.g., 'Successfully processed 2 issues')

IssueSummary.description: Summary of an issue extracted for code review context

summary.description: Concise summary of the issue (100-200 characters recommended)

keyPoints.description: Key acceptance criteria or fix points extracted from the issue

reviewContext.description: Context relevant to code review - what reviewers should focus on

examples.prDescription: This PR fixes the login validation issue.

issues.summary: Login fails when password contains special characters
keyPoints: Handle special characters in password input
Show proper error message for invalid input
issues.reviewContext: Check input validation and encoding for special characters

examples.parseMessage: No issue keys found in PR title
